assertions.summary: OpenAPI and endpoint inventory show exactly one public dispatch-posting host at POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm; the retired sales-prefixed dispatch-confirm alias is absent.
evidence: openapi.json route check: /api/v1/dispatch/confirm present; /api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm absent; /api/v1/orchestrator/factory/dispatch/{batchId} absent
erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv:94 lists DispatchController#confirmDispatch at POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm
erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/inventory/controller/DispatchController.java @RequestMapping("/api/v1/dispatch") and @PostMapping("/confirm")
bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh && bash scripts/guard_workflow_canonical_paths.sh -> OK

assertions.summary: Ownership stays split: factory/admin own canonical dispatch confirm, while sales/accounting only own the downstream reconciliation repair surface.
evidence: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/core/security/PortalRoleActionMatrix.java defines OPERATIONAL_DISPATCH for ROLE_ADMIN/ROLE_FACTORY and FINANCIAL_DISPATCH for ROLE_ADMIN/ROLE_ACCOUNTING
erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/sales/controller/SalesController.java:303 exposes POST /api/v1/sales/dispatch/reconcile-order-markers
docs/frontend-portals/sales/api-contracts.md states POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm is factory-owned and sales must not call it
docs/frontend-portals/portal-matrix.md marks dispatch confirm as factory-owned and excluded from sales/accounting portal ownership

assertions.summary: Retired dispatch aliases are absent in OpenAPI and the removal regression suite keeps the retired orchestrator path from creating side effects.
evidence: openapi.json route check: /api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm absent; /api/v1/orchestrator/factory/dispatch/{batchId} absent
TS_O2COrchestratorDispatchRemovalRegressionTest asserts DispatchRequest, dispatchBatch, and legacy dispatch journal helpers are removed
OrchestratorControllerIT rejects dispatch-like fulfillment with BUS_001 and a /api/v1/dispatch/confirm pointer while keeping invoice/journal/inventory counts unchanged
Live POST probes to retired routes on localhost:8081 returned 403 under auth gate, so absence proof came from OpenAPI plus regression coverage

assertions.summary: Orchestrator dispatch misuse fails closed to the canonical path and does not mutate shipment, invoice, journal, or inventory state.
evidence: OrchestratorControllerIT: POST /api/v1/orchestrator/orders/{orderId}/fulfillment returns 409 CONFLICT with BUS_001 and /api/v1/dispatch/confirm
OrchestratorControllerIT keeps outbox, audit, invoice, journal, and inventory counts unchanged after dispatch-like fulfillment attempts
TS_O2COrchestratorDispatchRemovalRegressionTest confirms the legacy orchestrator dispatch shortcut and retired payload are removed
commands.targeted-orchestrator-dispatch-proof passed: 85 tests, 0 failures

assertions.summary: The branch keeps positive proof for the surviving canonical dispatch path and explicit removal proof for retired seams.
evidence: commands.targeted-dispatch-proof passed: DispatchControllerTest, DispatchConfirmationIT, TS_O2CDispatchCanonicalPostingTest, TS_O2COrchestratorDispatchRemovalRegressionTest, OrderFulfillmentE2ETest; 46 tests, 0 failures

commands.targeted-orchestrator-dispatch-proof passed: OrchestratorControllerIT, IntegrationCoordinatorTest, CommandDispatcherTest, TS_O2COrchestratorDispatchRemovalRegressionTest, TS_RuntimeOrchestratorExecutableCoverageTest, TS_OrchestratorExactlyOnceOutboxTest; 85 tests, 0 failures
TS_O2COrchestratorDispatchRemovalRegressionTest removes retired orchestrator dispatch truth, while TS_O2CDispatchCanonicalPostingTest keeps the surviving path under proof

assertions.summary: Dispatch responses stay redacted for factory views and replay the same canonical result without alternate sales-owned shapes.
evidence: DispatchControllerTest asserts the redacted response has null journalEntryId, null cogsJournalEntryId, and null totalShippedAmount while keeping deliveryChallanPdfPath
DispatchOperationalBoundaryIT replay of POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm returns OK and preserves invoice/journal ids plus dispatch movement count

openapi.json includes POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm and the DispatchConfirmationResponse schema; docs/frontend-handoff.md and docs/frontend-portals/factory/workflows.md describe the same canonical path
frontend-handoff and frontend-v2 guidance state pure factory callers receive the operationally redacted response while elevated callers keep only permitted finance-linked fields

frictions: Strict runtime health stayed degraded at 9090/actuator/health = 503 (DOWN), but 8081/api/v1/auth/me still returned 403 so the app boundary remained testable.
Unauthenticated live POST probes to dispatch/orchestrator routes were gated with 403, so route-ownership and absence evidence relied on OpenAPI scans plus Maven regression suites.
notes: Runtime smoke observed health=503 and auth=403. Targeted dispatch/orchestrator proof packs and contract guards all passed, and no product code or docs were edited.
